name: opencli
description: Turn any website into a CLI — reuses Chrome login sessions to access 28+ commands across 16 platforms.

commands.name: list
commands.description: View all available commands and platforms

commands.name: explore
commands.description: AI-powered API discovery for a website

commands.name: synthesize
commands.description: Generate YAML adapter from discovered APIs

commands.name: hackernews top
commands.description: Fetch top Hacker News stories (public API)

commands.name: zhihu hot
commands.description: Fetch Zhihu hot topics in JSON format

use_cases: Access any website as a CLI using existing browser sessions
Discover and generate adapters for new platforms via AI
Extract structured data from websites in JSON/CSV format
